violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025
The hand-washing sinks in the kitchen and service areas were lacking paper towels. PIC refilled. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025

The hand-washing sinks in the service areas was blocked by food containers. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. PIC removed items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200 ppm. PIC refilled sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the 2 door freezer and lowboy cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025
Ice machine was observed with an airbreak where an airgap is required. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

The walk-in cooler door is in poor repair (door doesn't shut fully). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment has a work order for door. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025

At the time of inspection, coffee was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2024
At the time of inspection, 3 bay sink faucet was observed to be leaking and held together with a rag. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024
Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024

Eggs were observed held at 120-124 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024

The presence of small flying insects is not controlled as evidenced by an abundance of small flying insects observed throughout establishment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC to notify pest control of flying insects and follow recommendations. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024
Observed walk-in freezer to have an accumulation of ice buildup. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep units and shelving have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024
At the time of inspection, 3 bay sink faucet was observed to be leaking and held together with a rag. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024
